finding_results.notes: Replaced abstract feed/craving phrasing with bodily markers and blunt self-report: wet mouth, rough breath, shaking muscles, the wrist-mark compulsion, and a dry-mouthed lie about work.

Recast Tomas-read moments through Margot's observation and inference: strain leaving his face, the visible relief at the altitude explanation, and her speculation about which version of the story he will keep repeating.

summary: Revised chapter_04 in place for the prose/copyedit pass by grounding Margot's feed addiction in concrete bodily craving and tightening close-third POV so Tomas's state is only presented through what Margot can see and infer.
